body.title: IBD: add intention: field to ticket schema + audit enforcement
body.result: IBD intention: field added to schema, audit-ticket check #1, /ticket and /audit-ticket skills updated
body.description:
Add a required `intention:` string field to the ticket schema so every ticket begins with an 'I intend that...' statement — the root artifact of Intention-Based Development.

Shape: add `intention` key to cc_queue.py ticket JSON schema (optional for existing tickets, required for new); update /audit-ticket skill to flag tickets missing it at filing time; update /ticket skill to prompt for it during Step 2.

**Affected files:** $CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS/cc_queue.py, ~/.claude/skills/audit-ticket/SKILL.md, ~/.claude/skills/ticket/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** no-sqlite N/A; schema change is flat-file JSON only
**Scope boundary:** add field + enforcement in audit-ticket and ticket skills; no retroactive backfill of existing tickets
**Completion criteria:** `python cc_queue.py show T-ibd-intention-field` shows `intention` key populated; filing a new ticket via /sorted without an intention: statement causes /audit-ticket to return FAIL; filing with one returns PASS
